name: optimized_kozyrev_mirrors

phase_0.boundary_condition: The sealed outer enclosure of the optimized mirror cavity and the localized spacetime frame of the observer.

VINIT.chosen_element: Uncoated substrate and raw vacuum state before geometric shaping
VINIT.justification: Represents the initial unshaped condition prior to the establishment of the causal gradient.

TANCH.chosen_element: Sealed outer boundary of the optimized mirror cavity
TANCH.justification: Isolates the internal volume from external decoherence and defines the limits of the concentrated field.

AFWD.chosen_element: Forward propagation of causal energy and time flux entering the aperture
AFWD.justification: Directs the incident morphism into the system for geometric processing.

AREV.chosen_element: Retroreflected time flux bouncing off the highly polished inner surfaces
AREV.justification: Reverses the propagation vector to create the necessary standing wave conditions.

CLINK.chosen_element: Sequential bouncing of the causal waves between the angled facets
CLINK.justification: Chains the reflections to build the resonant standing wave through iterative composition.

IMSCRIB.justification: The concentrated time field acts upon the observer or instrument inside, creating a closed loop of measurement.

FSPLIT.chosen_element: Bifurcation of the incident causal wave into multiple distinct geometric paths
FSPLIT.justification: Splits the unified input flux across the diverging funnel facets to explore parallel phase trajectories.

FFUSE.chosen_element: Recombination of the reflected waves at the focal point or central axis
FFUSE.justification: Reconstructs the unified concentrated time field from the divergent paths, satisfying the Frobenius condition.

EVALT.chosen_element: Constructive interference and high time density concentration achieved
EVALT.justification: Affirms the successful phase alignment required for causal amplification.

EVALF.chosen_element: Destructive interference and phase cancellation of the causal field
EVALF.justification: Marks the failure state where wave trajectories negate each other.

ENGAGR.chosen_element: Superposition of incoming and reflected causal waves
ENGAGR.justification: Holds both the source flux and the concentrated echo simultaneously without collapse into a single classical state.

IFIX.chosen_element: Permanent calibration record and fixed geometric alignment of the mirror facets
IFIX.justification: Locks the optimized physical parameters into an appendonly state to prevent mechanical drift.

phase_3.void_description: Unshaped vacuum with no causal gradient or time density variation.
phase_3.true_description: High time density resonance with constructive interference.
phase_3.false_description: Phase cancellation, decoherence, and flat time gradient.
phase_3.both_description: Standing wave of causal energy holding incident and reflected flux in superposition.

steps.domain_action: Initialize raw vacuum state and unshaped substrate.
Direct incident causal time flux into the mirror aperture.
Bifurcate the incident flux across the angled geometric facets.
Propagate causal waves forward along the Tarm facets.
Chain the reflections sequentially between opposing Twalls.
Reflect causal waves backward along the Farm facets.
Chain the reflections sequentially between opposing Fwalls.
Recombine the reflected waves at the central focal axis.
Establish selfreferential resonance within the concentrated field.
Hold the superposition of incident and concentrated causal waves.
Permanently record the optimized geometric alignment and calibration.
Seal the cavity boundary to isolate the concentrated time field.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Geometric raytracing and causal wave equation solver.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Electromagnetic and gravitational coupling across the reflective surfaces.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Hysteresis in the metal lattice and persistent vacuum polarization.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Planetary rotation and local sidereal time driving the causal flux.
phase_5.alfs_store: Kozyrev theoretical framework on time density and causal mechanics.

phase_6.cycle_cost: Minute thermal dissipation and vacuum polarization energy.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Ambient flat spacetime with uniform time density.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Localized region of concentrated time density and altered causal metric.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0: The mirror acts as a conservative geometric lens for causal energy, redistributing time density without dissipating it.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → AFWD → FSPLIT → EVALT → AFWD → CLINK → EVALF → AREV → CLINK → FFUSE → IMSCRIB → ENGAGR → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: optimized_kozyrev_mirrors
-- Fingerprint: sig=(8,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=14
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(2, 9)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑾  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑼 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [2] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [3] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [4] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [5] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [6] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [7] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [8] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑚 → 𐑙  | composition — regime coherence
--   [9] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑠  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [10] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑙 → 𐑳  | identity — self-imscription
--   [11] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑠 → 𐑭  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [12] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑳 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [13] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def optimized_kozyrev_mirrors_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Initialize raw vacuum state and unshaped substrate.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑼 𐑚)  -- [1] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Direct incident causal time flux into the mirror aperture.)
  -- FSPLIT [2] (gran := 𐑚) (Bifurcate the incident flux across the angled geometric facets.) / FFUSE [9] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [3] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Affirm constructive interference path.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Propagate causal waves forward along the Tarm facets.)
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Chain the reflections sequentially between opposing Twalls.)
      -- F-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Evaluate destructive interference path.)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Reflect causal waves backward along the Farm facets.)
        (.arrow 𐑱 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Chain the reflections sequentially between opposing Fwalls.))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [9]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [9] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Recombine the reflected waves at the central focal axis.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [10] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Establish selfreferential resonance within the concentrated field.)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑠 𐑭)  -- [11] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Hold the superposition of incident and concentrated causal waves.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑳 𐑡)  -- [12] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Permanently record the optimized geometric alignment and calibration.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [13] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Seal the cavity boundary to isolate the concentrated time field.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def optimized_kozyrev_mirrors_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (optimized_kozyrev_mirrors_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def optimized_kozyrev_mirrors_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (optimized_kozyrev_mirrors_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem optimized_kozyrev_mirrors_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
